title: 4 Pcs Blindfold for Couples, Silky Soft Satin Eye Mask, Adjustable Comfortable Blindfold for Sleep, Meditation, Adult Games, Travel, Perfect Valentine's Day Gift, 125cm(Black+Red, M)
features: Packaging Includes：You’ll receive 4 beautifully crafted pieces—2 red and 2 black. We prioritize your satisfaction, so if you have any questions or suggestions about our Silk Satin Blindfold, please reach out.

Product Size：Measuring 125 x 7 cm (49.21 x 2.76 in), these satin eye masks are designed to fit comfortably on any head size. The long ties allow for easy adjustment, ensuring a perfect fit for all, whether you’re relaxing at home, playing games, or traveling.

Silky Soft Satin：Crafted from high-quality polyester, these blindfolds are soft, smooth, and gentle on the skin. Beautifully stitched and lightweight, they prevent pressure on your eyes, ensuring a comfortable fit. This attention to detail means you can enjoy a better quality of sleep.

Superior Light Blocking：Our sleep eye mask features excellent light-blocking performance. Whether you’re traveling, flying, at home, in the office, or just taking a nap or meditating, this satin eye mask is essential for providing peaceful and uninterrupted rest. Block out the world and enjoy the tranquility you deserve.

Elegant Presents：The rich colors make them ideal for personal use and as thoughtful gifts for couples. Surprise your spouse or partner with our satin sleep eye mask for special occasions such as wedding anniversaries, birthdays, or important holidays.
